heading: Drawback treatment
label: 1677h Drawback treatment
text: For purposes of any law relating to the drawback of customs duties, countervailing duties and antidumping duties imposed by this subtitle shall not be treated as being regular customs duties.
notes: Amendments1988— substituted “Drawback treatment” for “Drawbacks” in section catchline and “not be treated as being regular” for “be treated as any other” in text.Pub. L. 100–418
